hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams aggregate and prioritize wallet and transaction risk alerts with contextual data to streamline triage and accelerate decision-making.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: KYT alert triage depends on manual review
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and inconsistencies when KYT alerts arrive from multiple sources without unified context or prioritization. This fragmentation slows down risk assessment and obscures the connection between wallet activity, transaction risk, and investigative cases.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects KYT alerts, wallet activity, transaction risk signals and provider outputs into unified cases, enabling compliance teams to triage alerts with clear context and structured priority workflows.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to reviewable cases
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates wallet and transaction risk alerts, routes prioritized investigations, supports case creation, preserves evidence, and prepares audit-ready compliance records.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One evidence layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides compliance teams a unified layer that connects wallet risk signals with transactions, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence for clearer alert triage.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY helps VASP compliance teams manage wallet risk alerts with structured workflows, preserved evidence and governed deployment for stronger auditability and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support KYT alert triage for transaction monitoring
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYT alerts are prioritized and routed for review
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how alert evidence links wallets, transactions and cases
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY manages provider outputs in alert workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYT alert triage?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet and transaction risk alerts into structured triage workflows, helping compliance teams prioritize cases with integrated context from multiple providers.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage KYT alert workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes KYT alerts based on configurable risk thresholds, links them to related wallets, transactions and customers, then opens cases with decision logs and evidence.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves full case history, alert details and decision logs within audit-ready workflows that support traceability and defendable compliance review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY operates above existing KYC, KYT and screening systems, aggregating provider outputs into a connected operational layer without replacing current tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or analytics providers but connects their outputs into structured reviews, evidence, cases and reporting workflows.
final_title: Bring KYT alerts into structured triage workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects wallet and transaction alerts into prioritized cases with evidence and reviewer context for efficient triage.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
